title: New state-of-the-art equipment at Union High
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School was thrilled to welcome a team from Staccato Music after the Easter long weekend break, who upgraded the school hall's audio and lighting systems to create a more dynamic and engaging environment for its learners and community.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School was thrilled to welcome a team from Staccato Music after the Easter long weekend break, who upgraded the school hall's audio and lighting systems to create a more dynamic and engaging environment for its learners and community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An impressive array of state-of-the-art equipment was installed, including a brand-new sound desk, complemented by high-performance amplifiers and bass subs that will ensure rich, full-bodied sound.","html":"An impressive array of state-of-the-art equipment was installed, including a brand-new sound desk, complemented by high-performance amplifiers and bass subs that will ensure rich, full-bodied sound."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In addition, the stage was equipped with new hanging microphones and wireless belt packs, which will make it easier for performers to shine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clarity and quality of sound will be unparalleled.","html":"Clarity and quality of sound will be unparalleled."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A complete overhaul of the lighting system was also done.","html":"A complete overhaul of the lighting system was also done."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The new setup will enhance the visual experience and can be controlled from a computer at the back of the hall.","html":"The new setup will enhance the visual experience and can be controlled from a computer at the back of the hall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This means that stage lights and lights in the hall can be synchronised with music, elevating the mood and energy of all events.","html":"This means that stage lights and lights in the hall can be synchronised with music, elevating the mood and energy of all events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These upgrades will provide the learners of Union High with a fantastic platform for creative expression.","html":"These upgrades will provide the learners of Union High with a fantastic platform for creative expression."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The facilitators at Union High are very grateful to Staccato Music for the improvements that will take the school's productions and cultural events to new heights.","html":"The facilitators at Union High are very grateful to Staccato Music for the improvements that will take the school's productions and cultural events to new heights."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New state-of-the-art equipment at Union High
